_instructions: Replace every TODO above. Add 4-7 more parameters per panel guidance.
Required: at least one parameter MUST cite a specific published study (Vartanian, Kaplan & Kaplan, Ulrich, Munch, Joye, Bermudez, Meyers-Levy, Sommer, Barrett, etc.).
When you ship this manifest, also create a paired params/<room>_default.json with the manifest's default values; the infinigen_wrapper.py validates against this manifest at render time.
JSON-Schema $schema constraint: do not introduce // comments — use _comment keys instead.
